text:
Gyro's Father was the abusive father of Gyro, who founded the NGL. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 20, Chapter 204 

Appearance

Gyro's Father had short hair, wore no shoes, and wore a ragged T-shirt and shorts. 

Personality

Gyro's Father was extremely cruel and selfish, caring for no one but himself. A man of few words, his silence made it hard for Gyro to learn how to speak. He was very strict, to the point that he always ordered Gyro never to make a sound while sleeping and to go to the bathroom only twice daily. When his orders were not met, he beat Gyro. His constant reminder to never make trouble for anyone meant that Gyro should not make trouble for his father. Despite his cruelty, Gyro idolized him and saw him as a god, until Gyro realized that his father never cared for him. 

Background

Gyro and his father lived and worked in a construction camp. The single father barely paid any attention to his son and spent most of his time drinking. He always reprimanded his son not to make trouble for anyone, which Gyro took to heart. 

One day, one of the teenagers in the camp bullied Gyro and revealed to him that his father never cared for him. He harshly told Gyro that a neighbor, not his father, cared for him when he was sick. At that same moment, his Father happened to pass by and looked at Gyro being beaten. To Gyro's surprise, his father merely turned and walked away without a word. 

After that incident, Gyro realized that his father had never seen him as a person. When Gyro got home, he picked up a hammer and killed his father with it. He ran away from the camp and established NGL nine years later. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Gyro's Father briefly appears in a flashback as Gyro, now reborn as a Chimera Ant, walks around the same town where Gon Freecss and Killua Zoldyck are. 

Manga Appearances

Quotes

(When asked if Gyro dies) "Who cares? Doesn't matter to me either way."
